nasb.text: Then he said, “May God do so to me and more also, if the head of Elisha the son of Shaphat remains on him today.”

esv.text: and he said, “May God do so to me and more also, if the head of Elisha the son of Shaphat remains on his shoulders today.”

cnv.text: 他說：“如果今日沙法的兒子以利沙的頭仍留在他身上，願　神懲罰我，而且加倍懲罰我。”

ccb.text: 王说：“如果今天沙法的儿子以利沙的头颅还留在他颈项上，愿上帝重重地惩罚我！”
